body.title: T-theigors-to-uu-migration phases 6-7: env vars + archive TheIgors
body.result: phase 6: env vars already optional, uu.cfg.template updated; phase 7: ~/TheIgors → ~/TheIgors.archive, TheIgors refs removed from dispatch.py
body.description:
Phases 2-5 of the TheIgors→UU migration are done. Phases 6-7 remain:

Phase 6: Fold IGOR_RUNTIME_ROOT and IGOR_INSTANCE_ID into config.cfg defaults so they no longer need to be set as env vars. Any code still reading them from os.environ should fall back to config.cfg values.

Phase 7: Validate all runtime paths resolve correctly against ~/.unseen_university, then archive ~/TheIgors (rename to ~/TheIgors.archive or similar). Remove any remaining ~/TheIgors symlinks from lab/claudecode.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/config.py or equivalent, devices/igor/paths.py, ~/TheIgors (archive)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no TheIgors imports from UU; runtime root is ~/.unseen_university
**Scope boundary:** IN — env var → config.cfg fallback; ~/TheIgors archived; all paths verified; OUT — TheIgors deletion (archive only, not delete)
**Completion criteria:** Igor starts without IGOR_RUNTIME_ROOT or IGOR_INSTANCE_ID in environment; ~/TheIgors.archive exists; no broken imports; all tests pass
